net.sf.saxon.om

Class CopyOptions

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.sf.saxon.om.CopyOptions

  • public abstract class CopyOptions
extends java.lang.Object
    Non-instantiable class to define options for the NodeInfo.copy(net.sf.saxon.event.Receiver, int, int) method
